title: Selection Simplifier
summary: Selection Simplifier started with a simple idea: make difficult writing easier to understand without disrupting the act of reading. I conceived a browser extension that turns any selected passage into plain English using the GPT API, returning a clearer version directly in context.

hero.alt: Dense writing transforming into a shorter plain-English passage

media.alt: Browser extension simplifying selected text into plain English
Original complex passage transitioning into a shorter plain-English version
